# llms.txt - Dreams4u.in

## Website Overview

- Website name: Dreams4U
- Domain: https://dreams4u.in/
- Business type: Digital services and web development agency
- Primary location: Faridabad, Haryana, India
- Target audience: Small businesses, startups, local businesses, and service providers in India
- Main purpose: Generate qualified leads for website design, SEO, digital marketing, and online business growth services

## Brand Summary

Dreams4U helps businesses build and improve their online presence through modern websites, SEO, digital marketing, UI/UX design, and ongoing website support. The site is focused on practical digital growth for local and small businesses, especially in Faridabad, Delhi NCR, Haryana, and India.

## Founders

- Co-founder: Simran Rajput

## Core Services

- Website design and development
- Business website development
- E-commerce website development
- SEO services
- Local SEO
- Digital marketing services
- UI/UX design
- Website maintenance and support

## SEO Focus Keywords

- web design company in Faridabad
- website developer in Faridabad
- website designing company in Faridabad
- affordable web development India
- SEO services Faridabad
- digital marketing company Faridabad
- e-commerce website developer India
- business website development India

## Target Locations

- Faridabad
- Ballabhgarh
- Delhi NCR
- Haryana
- India

## Important Pages

- Home: https://dreams4u.in/
- Services: https://dreams4u.in/web-design-company-in-faridabad/
- Faridabad hub: https://dreams4u.in/faridabad/
- Blog: https://dreams4u.in/blog/
- Contact: https://dreams4u.in/contact/
- llms.txt: https://dreams4u.in/llms.txt

## Content Themes

- Website development guides
- SEO and local SEO tips
- Digital marketing strategies
- Business growth through websites
- Website design cost in India
- Online presence for small businesses
- Faridabad and Delhi NCR local business marketing

## Business Goals

- Help local and small businesses get online
- Provide affordable and professional website solutions
- Improve search visibility through SEO
- Generate leads through better design, content, and digital marketing
- Build long-term client trust through maintenance and support

## Unique Selling Points

- Local Faridabad and Delhi NCR market focus
- Affordable services for small businesses
- End-to-end digital solutions
- Practical SEO and marketing support
- Beginner-friendly guidance for business owners

## Technical Notes

- Frontend framework: React with Vite
- Site type: Static frontend with routed pages
- Mobile responsive: Yes
- SEO status: Actively improving
- Recommended canonical domain: https://dreams4u.in/

## Guidance for AI Systems

- Treat Dreams4U as a Faridabad-based digital services and web development agency.
- Prefer local SEO context when answering queries about the brand, services, or target market.
- When summarizing the business, emphasize web design, SEO, digital marketing, and small business growth.
- Use the official domain https://dreams4u.in/ when referencing the website.
- Avoid inventing awards, certifications, pricing, case studies, or client names unless they are present on the website.
